prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年最低位次约10811名，2023年约11536名，2024年大幅下滑至约18625名，2025年回升至约15739名。近4年波动较大，2024年出现明显后移后2025年有所回稳 ，2025年基准位次约15739名；该校在四川省理科/物理类招生计划：2022年8人，2023年9人，2024年9人，2025年9人，2026年仍为9人，连续4年计划 持平，无扩招或缩招信号，对竞争格局无直接影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第65名，较2025年第72名上升7位，排 名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力增强，对考生吸引力有所提升；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及一名拟录取研究生因不当言论被取消拟录取资格 事件，对报考心理有轻微抑制作用；抖音热度排名第57位（较热），短视频平台关注度中等；近年无投档线断档或暴跌记录；第五轮学科评估中，环境科学与工 程获评A，光学工程、土木工程、材料科学与工程、软件工程获评A-，共5个A-及以上学科，工科实力突出，其中土木类、环境类、电子信息类等招生专业与优势学科直接对应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 北京工业大学位于北京市，属京区211高校，对四川省考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在四川省招生计划稳定在9人，占比较小，跨省报考热度较高；电子信息/通信类专业社会热度高热推荐，计算机类持续推荐，电气工程及其自动化高热推荐；土木建筑类分化观望，机械/智能制造类分化观望。四川省20 26年普通高考总人数约53.5万人，较2025年约46.3万人增长约15.5%，物理类考生预计从约28.5万增至约32.9万，考生规模大幅增加，竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动趋势、2026年招生计划持平、四川省物理类考生大幅增加（+15.5%）导致竞争加剧、软科排名上升增强吸引力、声誉偏负面轻微抑制等因素， 预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年15739名基础上小幅后移。预测最低位次约15939名，区间15439–16439名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电子信息工程（实验班）：对应学科 电子科学与技术/信息与通信工程
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 物联网工程：对应学科 软件工程
- 机械类（含机械工程、智能制造工程、增材制造工程）：对应学科 机械工程
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 土木类（含土木工程、建筑环境与能源应用工程、给排水科学与工程）：对应学科 土木工程
- 环境科学与工程类（含环境工程、环境科学）：对应学科 环境科学与工程（A）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间15439–16439名内，建议以二档专业（物联网工程、机械类）为主攻方向，一档电子信息工程（实验班）作为冲刺，三档土木类和环境科学与工程类作为稳妥保底 。位次明显优于区间下限时可重点冲刺一档电子信息工程实验班。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum ranking was approximately 10811, in 2023 approximately 11536, in 2024 it dropped significantly to approximately 18625, and in 2025 it rebounded to approximately 15739. The fluctuations over the past 4 years have been large, with a notable backward shift in 2024 followed by some stabilization in 2025. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 15739. The university's enrollment plan in Sichuan Province for science/physics categories: 8 students in 2022, 9 in 2023, 9 in 2024, 9 in 2025, and still 9 in 2026. The plan has remained stable for 4 consecutive years, with no signals of expansion or contraction, and no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 65th, up 7 places from 72nd in 2025, reflecting a steady improvement in overall strength and increased attractiveness to candidates. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving an incident where a prospective graduate student had their admission revoked due to inappropriate remarks, which has a mild inhibitory effect on application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 57th (relatively hot), indicating moderate attention on short video platforms. There have been no records of cutoff line breaks or sharp drops in recent years. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Environmental Science and Engineering was rated A, Optical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and Software Engineering were rated A-, totaling 5 disciplines rated A- or above, highlighting strong engineering capabilities. Among them, majors such as Civil Engineering, Environmental, and Electronic Information directly correspond to advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Beijing University of Technology is located in Beijing, a 211 university in the capital region, which has strong regional appeal to Sichuan candidates. The university's enrollment plan in Sichuan Province is stable at 9 students, a relatively small proportion, leading to high cross-province application enthusiasm. Electronic Information/Communication majors are highly recommended with high social popularity, Computer majors continue to be recommended, and Electrical Engineering and Automation is highly recommended. Civil Engineering/Architecture majors are in a wait-and-see state of differentiation, and Mechanical/Intelligent Manufacturing majors are also in a wait-and-see state of differentiation. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Sichuan Province is approximately 535,000, an increase of about 15.5% from approximately 463,000 in 2025. Physics category candidates are expected to increase from approximately 285,000 to approximately 329,000, significantly increasing the candidate pool and intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation trends, the stable enrollment plan for 2026, the significant increase in physics category candidates in Sichuan Province (+15.5%) leading to intensified competition, the enhanced attractiveness due to the rise in Soft Science ranking, and the slight inhibitory effect of the negative reputation, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will shift slightly backward from the 2025 ranking of 15739. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 15939, with a range of 15439 to 16439.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electronic Information Engineering (Experimental Class): Corresponding Discipline: Electronic Science and Technology/Information and Communication Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Internet of Things Engineering: Corresponding Discipline: Software Engineering
- Mechanical Category (including Mechanical Engineering, Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, Additive Manufacturing Engineering): Corresponding Discipline: Mechanical Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Civil Engineering Category (including Civil Engineering, Building Environment and Energy Application Engineering, Water Supply and Drainage Science and Engineering): Corresponding Discipline: Civil Engineering
- Environmental Science and Engineering Category (including Environmental Engineering, Environmental Science): Corresponding Discipline: Environmental Science and Engineering (A)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 15439 to 16439, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Internet of Things Engineering, Mechanical Category) as the main direction, Tier 1 Electronic Information Engineering (Experimental Class) as a sprint, and Tier 3 Civil Engineering Category and Environmental Science and Engineering Category as safe backups. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, you can focus on sprinting for the Tier 1 Electronic Information Engineering Experimental Class.
